goals.title: AdminAction contract and enforcement
goals.objective: Add typed AdminAction draft/confirm contracts, enforce confirmed nonces for generated high-risk routes, and audit before mutation forwarding.
goals.evidence: Added Gateway.AdminActionDraft/AdminActionConfirm contracts, process-local AdminActionManager, and generated-route enforcement with single-use confirmation token and audit receipt.

goals.title: Verification and handoff
goals.objective: Update focused tests/docs, run targeted verification, commit, open PR, and hand off to QA.
goals.evidence: Updated docs/GATEWAY.md and tests/unit/gateway/test_route_generator_adminaction.py; targeted pytest and ruff passed.
